one_time_description: Treaty Loan Forgiveness recognized in prior year (2020) as other income
economic_notes: Nation entered agreement to reconstruct wharf for $6,382,440; Solid Waste Management Centre construction $1,647,715; purchased Forest Tenure FL A82001 for $9,000,585 — all in year ending March 31, 2022. Great Bear Carbon Credit Limited Partnership generating revenue. Midawis Maintenance Services Limited Partnership is a consolidated controlled entity.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 but audit report dated July 11, 2023 — significant delay. Prior year (2020) included $9,269,172 Treaty Loan Forgiveness as a one-time item. Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Kvamua Enterprises LP (100%) and Central Coast Commercial Fisheries LP (25%). Midawis Maintenance Services LP is a fully consolidated controlled entity. CMHC replacement reserve under-funded by $310,628. Diesel spill contingent liability of $2.3-2.6M not recorded. Civil claim pending from contractor re: Nicknaqueet River Mini Hydro and Youth Centre projects. Nation subject to Remedial Management Action Plan with ISC. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $4,149,175 + Province of BC $851,609 + FNHA $1,197,469 + DFO $255,594 + CMHC $72,821 + Gaming Revenue Sharing $552,819 + BC Gaming LP in provincial $320,154 — simplified as ISC + Province + FNHA + DFO + CMHC = $6,526,668 plus Gaming $552,819 + WKNTC $70,945 + Great Bear Initiative $90,636 + CCIRA $317,175 = $7,558,243; osr adjusted accordingly. No remuneration schedule included in the extracted text.
